positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a sleeping celestial raccoon curled up in a constellation made of glowing crescent moons and stars. The raccoon is rendered in a deep midnight blue and slate grey palette, contrasting against vivid cosmic purples and electric teal accents. The background space should feature nebula swirls and minimalist astronomical guides. The style is highly detailed, clean line art mixed with watercolor textures, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, high contrast, strong negative space, ethereal glow effect, flat vector elements integrated into the illustration.
